title: Wire pathfinder events (path_update, goal_reached, path_stop) in MineflayerAdapter
description:
Wire mineflayer-pathfinder event listeners so the agent knows WHY navigation succeeded or failed. This is the single biggest telemetry gap identified in the Mineflayer audit.

Currently all 7 `await bot.pathfinder.goto(...)` calls are fire-and-wait — the C# side gets no pathfinding telemetry beyond the final success/failure. If goto() hangs (known issue: mineflayer-pathfinder #222, #273), the agent stalls silently.

Implementation:
1. Register pathfinder event listeners (use `bot.pathfinder.on(...)`, not `bot.on(...)` per mineflayer-pathfinder docs):
   - `goal_reached` → log and emit `goalReached` event with target coords + correlationId
   - `path_update` → emit only on non-success statuses: `noPath`, `timeout`, `partial`. Do NOT forward `success` status (fires on every recalc during goto).
   - `path_stop` → emit `pathStopped` event when pathfinder is externally stopped
2. Add `PathUpdateEvent` and `GoalReachedEvent` to `Agent.Core/Events/WorldEvents.cs`:
   - `PathUpdateEvent(string Status, int? RemainingNodes, Position Target, DateTimeOffset Timestamp)`
   - `GoalReachedEvent(Position Target, DateTimeOffset Timestamp)`
   - `PathStoppedEvent(string? Reason, DateTimeOffset Timestamp)`
3. Handle in `WebSocketBridge.ParseEvent()` and `AgentBackgroundService.ProcessEventsAsync()`.
4. Project in `WorldStateProjector` to update `WorldState` with last pathfinder status.
5. Include pathfinder state in `ScenePackBuilder` (TSK-0150) or `BuildSystemPrompt`.

Tunable constants at top of index.js:
- `PATH_UPDATE_MAX_NODES = 500` — max nodes to include in path_update event (avoid huge payloads)

Acceptance:
- Agent receives `goalReached` when pathfinding succeeds.
- Agent receives `pathUpdate` with `noPath`/`timeout` status when pathfinding fails.
- No events forwarded on `pathUpdate` with `success` status (noise reduction).
- C# tests validate new event types.

Refs: `mineflayer-adapter-research.md` DEF-PAPER-1, DEF-PAPER-3, OQ-2; `msa_planning_mineflayer_audit_20260621_1437.md` Finding 2, Finding 6
